title: Communauté de communes de Bayeux Intercom
summary: Bayeux Intercom is the intercommunal structure centered on the town of Bayeux. It is located in the Calvados Department in the region of Normandy, northwestern France. It was created in 1994 and its seat is in Bayeux. Its area is 199 square kilometers. As of 2021 its population was 29,919, with 12,775 people living in Bayeux proper.
text:
Bayeux Intercom is the intercommunal structure centered on the town of Bayeux. It is located in the Calvados Department in the region of Normandy, northwestern France. It was created in 1994 and its seat is in Bayeux. Its area is 199 square kilometers. As of 2021 its population was 29,919, with 12,775 people living in Bayeux proper.

Composition
Bayeux Intercom is made up of the following 36 communes:
